pricing.refundPolicy: No refunds after evaluation access is granted. Resets available at $75 for most models. Fast Track accounts cannot be reset.

rules.consistencyRule: Sim-Funded accounts require 10 Active Trading Days where each day earns at least 23% of your best day's profit, with a minimum floor of $100–$200 depending on account size. No consistency rule during evaluations.
rules.notes: News trading allowed across all models. Weekend holding only permitted on Diamond Hands and LIVE Elite accounts. Copy trading and multi-account mirroring allowed post-LIVE Elite with approval. Algo trading permitted with compatible Rithmic platforms — no martingale, HFT, or scratch trades. 10-second rule prohibits entering and exiting a trade within 10 seconds. VPNs and masked connections banned — stable IP and verified location required. Position caps enforced per model (e.g. 2 minis/20 micros on 25K DTF, up to 24 minis/240 micros on 250K Fast Track). Breaching position limits results in instant disqualification and forfeited profits. Up to 20 active Sim-Funded accounts allowed, maximum 3 Fast Tracks. Fast Track has a 14-day hard calendar limit. OFAC-sanctioned countries blocked at all stages. All trades routed via Rithmic to regulated US exchanges.

markets.instruments: Futures only — CME (Forex Futures, Crypto Futures incl. BTC/ETH, Index Futures incl. ES/NQ/YM/RTY, Interest Rates), CBOT (Agricultural incl. Corn/Wheat/Soybeans, Treasuries), COMEX (Gold, Silver, Copper, Platinum, Palladium), NYMEX (Crude Oil, Natural Gas, Gasoline, Heating Oil). Standard, mini, and micro contracts available. No stocks, spot forex, or CFDs.

notableFlags: Not regulated or broker-backed during evaluation and Sim-Funded stages
LIVE Elite accounts funded through EdgeClear broker partnership
No published criteria for LIVE Elite account approval
Sim-Funded accounts are demo-based with payout eligibility
Mixed reviews — payout disputes and rule interpretation concerns on forums

tags: No Clear Path to Live Funding
